title: Climate Change 101: How It Works
description: A clear, visual explainer on what climate change is, why it's happening, and what we can do about it.

title: The Amazon is on Fire
description: Explores the devastating fires in the Amazon rainforest and their global consequences for biodiversity and climate.

title: The Ocean Cleanup Project
description: Learn how Boyan Slat and his team are working to remove plastic from the Great Pacific Garbage Patch.

title: Biodiversity: Why Every Species Matters
description: A deep dive into why biodiversity is crucial for ecosystem health, food security, and human wellbeing.
